Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted.

Order signed. Consent Judgment signed.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/CK)
